title: [codereview] Gateway does not call handle_frame_rpl on incoming mesh frames; DAOs ignored by root router
description: In forward_mesh_to_upstream and run_* functions, only mesh_to_upstream (SCHC decompress) is used. No call to node.handle_frame_rpl(l2_payload, &mut reply, now_ms) which is required to process RPL_ICMPV6 DAO messages and update routes via process_dao. Root must consume DAOs to populate RoutingTable for is_local_mesh and SRH downward routing. Add now_ms param (trickle timers) and integrate RplEvent handling. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-ybf4
close_reason: 3 codereview passes (P3/P4 only) complete; cargo test/clippy passed; fix applied by ensuring handle_frame_rpl called on mesh frames in forward/run mimicking gateway DAO/route update
